summary: Bug Fix Complete - Paperwork page crash resolved. Root cause: TypeError in PillarPicksSection.jsx when price is null. JavaScript quirk `typeof null === 'object'` caused `pick.price.amount` to fail.

issues: Duplicate keys warning for 'insure-quote-free' - not causing crash but should be fixed

action_items: DONE: Fixed null price handling in PillarPicksSection.jsx - ProductPickCard and ProductDetailModal components
DONE: Fixed similar issue in SoulMadeCollection.jsx
MINOR: Consider fixing duplicate key warning for 'insure-quote-free' in ServiceCatalogSection
critical_code_review_comments: Root cause: `typeof null === 'object'` is a known JavaScript quirk. Code was checking `typeof pick.price === 'object'` which returned true for null, then tried to access `pick.price.amount` causing crash
Fix applied: Changed to `(pick.price && typeof pick.price === 'object')` to properly check for non-null objects
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paperwork page crash fixed. The issue was null price handling in PillarPicksSection.jsx. Page now loads successfully for both anonymous and logged-in users. Verified stable after 20+ seconds wait.

rca_of_the_issue.error_message: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'amount')
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: JavaScript's typeof operator returns 'object' for null values. The code `typeof pick.price === 'object'` returned true for null prices, then tried to access pick.price.amount which threw an error.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed price checks from `typeof x.price === 'object'` to `(x.price && typeof x.price === 'object')` to ensure non-null check before object type check
rca_of_the_issue.verified: Page tested with logged-in user, stable for 20+ seconds, no crash
